title: Security Analyst
description: Lead security monitoring, incident analysis, and threat response operations. Work with advanced detection systems to protect critical client infrastructure against sophisticated adversaries.
requirements: 5+ years in security operations or incident response
Deep expertise with SIEM platforms and threat hunting methodologies
Proven track record in APT analysis and attribution

title: Penetration Tester
description: Execute authorized security assessments across diverse environments. Identify and exploit vulnerabilities in networks, applications, and systems with detailed remediation guidance.
requirements: Expertise in manual exploitation and custom tooling
Experience across web, network, cloud, and mobile attack surfaces
OSCP, OSCE, or equivalent demonstrated capability
Clear technical communication and reporting skills

title: Cryptographic Researcher
description: Advance our cryptographic capabilities through original research and implementation analysis. Evaluate cryptosystems, identify weaknesses, and develop novel approaches to secure communications.
requirements: PhD in cryptography, mathematics, or equivalent research experience
Published work in peer-reviewed security venues
Proficiency with formal verification and proof systems
